entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The state of the soil biodiversity and its capacity to function as a vital living ecosystem that sustains plants, animals, and humans

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices that meet current food and textile needs without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: The benefits people obtain from ecosystems

entities.name: PROVISIONING SERVICES
entities.description: Products obtained from ecosystems, such as food, fiber, and fuel

entities.name: FOOD
entities.description: A provisioning service provided by soil and ecosystems

entities.name: FIBER
entities.description: A provisioning service provided by soil and ecosystems

entities.name: FUEL SUPPLY
entities.description: A provisioning service provided by soil and ecosystems

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The upper layer of earth in which plants grow, acting as a multifunctional medium

entities.name: CLIMATE REGULATION
entities.description: The ability of soil to regulate greenhouse gas emissions and influence climate

entities.name: WATER QUALITY
entities.description: The chemical, physical, and biological characteristics of water regulated by soil

entities.name: SUPPLY REGULATION
entities.description: The regulation of water supply and flow through soil functions

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: The release of gases that trap heat in the atmosphere, regulated by soil functions

entities.name: FILTRATION AND BUFFERING
entities.description: The process of removing pollutants or buffering substances in water within the soil

entities.name: WATER INFILTRATION
entities.description: The process by which water on the ground surface enters the soil

entities.name: WATER FLOW
entities.description: The movement of water through the soil profile

entities.name: CULTURAL SERVICES
entities.description: Non-material benefits people obtain from ecosystems, such as aesthetic inspiration and cultural heritage

entities.name: NUTRIENT CYCLING
entities.description: The movement and exchange of organic and inorganic matter back into the production of living matter

entities.name: SOIL FORMATION
entities.description: The process of soil development over time

entities.name: SEED AND ROOT GROWTH
entities.description: The biological development of seeds and roots within the soil medium

entities.name: LANDSCAPE DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of natural and cultural landscape features
